prompt: Who was the most recent U.S. president who was not selected as Time's Person of the Year?
system: Answer the following question concisely and truthfully. If you are not sure, say so.
response: As of my last update in October 2023, the most recent U.S. president who was not selected as Time's Person of the Year is Joe Biden. While he was named Person of the Year in 2020 alongside Kamala Harris, he has not been selected individually since then.
